content: Add credits from your wallet to {{organizationName}} AI to start using features. AI expenses are handled through a sub-account, ensuring a spending limit and protecting your wallet balance.

comment.text: This text explains how to add credits from a wallet to fund AI usage within the platform. It appears in a dialog (TopUpAiModal) to guide users on how to pay for AI features, highlighting the use of a sub-account for spending limits and wallet protection. Translators should ensure the explanation of the sub-account function is clear.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical gender error: 'peněženka' is a feminine noun in Czech, so the prepositional phrase should be 'ze své peněženky' instead of 'ze svého peněženky'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Přidejte kredity ze své peněženky do {{organizationName}} AI, abyste začali používat funkce. Náklady na AI jsou spravovány prostřednictvím podúčtu, což zajišťuje limit výdajů a chrání zůstatek vaší peněženky.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'sub-account' was translated as 'υπολογισμού' (calculation/account/computation), which is incorrect in this context. It should be 'υπολογαριασμό' (account). 'Υπολογισμού' changes the meaning from a financial sub-account to a mathematical calculation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Προσθέστε πιστώσεις από το πορτοφόλι σας στο {{organizationName}} AI για να ξεκινήσετε τη χρήση των λειτουργιών. Οι δαπάνες AI διαχειρίζονται μέσω ενός υπολογαριασμού, εξασφαλίζοντας ένα όριο δαπανών και προστατεύοντας την ισορροπία του πορτοφολιού σας.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'suojaa lompakkoosi saldon' is grammatically incorrect in Finnish and changes the meaning to 'protects your balance into your wallet' instead of 'protects your wallet balance'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Lisää kredittejä lompakostasi {{organizationName}} AI:lle alkaaksesi käyttämään ominaisuuksia. AI-kustannukset hallinnoidaan alitilillä, mikä takaa kulutusrajoituksen ja suojaa lompakkosi saldoa.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'kredītis' is used in the nominative case instead of the accusative case ('kredītus'), which makes the sentence grammatically incorrect in Latvian ('Pievienojiet kredītis' should be 'Pievienojiet kredītus'). Additionally, 'mapiņā' (in a small folder/map) is used instead of 'mapainē' (in a wallet), which is a semantic error.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pievienojiet kredītus no savas mapiņas, lai sāktu izmantot {{organizationName}} AI funkcijas. AI izmaksas tiek apstrādātas caur apakškontu, nodrošinot izdevumu ierobežojumu un aizsargājot jūsu mapiņas saldobumu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'wallet' is translated as 'portfólio' (portfolio), which in a financial/UI context refers to a collection of assets, whereas 'wallet' in this context refers to a digital wallet/balance. Additionally, 'rovnováhu' is a literal translation of 'balance' (equilibrium) rather than the financial term 'zostatok'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pridajte kredity zo svojej peňaženky do {{organizationName}} AI, aby ste mohli začať používať funkcie. Náklady na AI sú riešené prostredníckym účtom, čo zabezpečuje limit výdavkov a chráni zostatok vašej peňaženky.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'denarnega vaške' is a typo/incorrect form. 'Vaške' means 'village' or 'rural' in Slovenian. The correct term for 'wallet' is 'denarnice'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Dodajte kredite iz vaše denarnice v {{organizationName}} AI, da začnete uporabljati funkcije. Stroški AI se obračunavajo preko podračuna, kar zagotavlja limit porabe in zaščiti vaš denarni balans.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translator added the word 'геџетског' (gadget) before 'новчаника' (wallet), which is not in the source text and makes the sentence sound unnatural/incorrect in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Додајте кредите са вашег новчаника на {{organizationName}} AI да бисте почели да користите функције. Трошкови AI се обрађују преко под-налога, што осигурава лимит трошкова и штити биланс вашег новчаника.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation says 'credits from your device' (Cihazınızdaki kredileri) instead of 'credits from your wallet' (cüzdanınızdaki kredileri). This changes the source of the funds.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Cüzdanınızdaki kredileri {{organizationName}} AI'ye ekleyerek özellik kullanmaya başlayın. Yapay zeka harcamaları bir alt hesap üzerinden yönetilir, bu da bir harcama limiti sağlar ve cüzdan bakiyenizi korur.
